channel.title: Whamcloud Community JIRA
channel.description: This file is an XML representation of an issue

item.title: [LU-9614] recovery-small_18a test failed : error on ioctl 0x4008669a for '/mnt/lustre/d18a.recovery-small/f18a.recovery-small' (3): Invalid argument
item.description:
stdout.log
== recovery-small test 18a: manual ost invalidate clears page cache immediately == 09:22:17 (1461316937)
error on ioctl 0x4008669a for '/mnt/lustre/d18a.recovery-small/f18a.recovery-small' (3): Invalid argument
error: setstripe: create stripe file '/mnt/lustre/d18a.recovery-small/f18a.recovery-small' failed
/usr/lib64/lustre/tests/recovery-small.sh: line 442: [: too many arguments
there is still data in page cache llite.lustre-ffff88011b06b000.dump_page_cache ?
0@[0x200000400:0x2:0x0]: 0 | ffff88011af3a068 ffff88011af3a000 none - - - | ffffea000396abe0 [0x200000400:0x2:0x0](ffff88011a365638) 0 3 [referenced|uptodate]
1@[0x200000400:0x2:0x0]: 0 | ffff88010b6f3a68 ffff88010b6f3a00 none - - - | ffffea00039c5a58 [0x200000400:0x2:0x0](ffff88011a365638) 1 3 [referenced|uptodate]
2@[0x200000400:0x2:0x0]: 0 | ffff88010b6f3e68 ffff88010b6f3e00 none - - - | ffffea0003a7b518 [0x200000400:0x2:0x0](ffff88011a365638) 2 3 [referenced|uptodate]
3@[0x200000400:0x2:0x0]: 0 | ffff88010a7adc68 ffff88010a7adc00 none - - - | ffffea0003a2d1a0 [0x200000400:0x2:0x0](ffff88011a365638) 3 3 [referenced|uptodate]
4@[0x200000400:0x2:0x0]: 0 | ffff88011af3aa68 ffff88011af3aa00 none - - - | ffffea00039515e0 [0x200000400:0x2:0x0](ffff88011a365638) 4 3 [referenced|uptodate]

recovery-small test_18a: @@@@@@ FAIL: test_18a failed with 2
Trace dump:
= /usr/lib64/lustre/tests/../tests/test-framework.sh:4672:error()
= /usr/lib64/lustre/tests/../tests/test-framework.sh:4932:run_one()
= /usr/lib64/lustre/tests/../tests/test-framework.sh:4968:run_one_logged()
= /usr/lib64/lustre/tests/../tests/test-framework.sh:4774:run_test()
= /usr/lib64/lustre/tests/recovery-small.sh:459:main()
Dumping lctl log to /tmp/test_logs/1461325725/recovery-small.test_18a.*.1461325731.log
fre1229: Warning: Permanently added 'fre1231,192.168.112.31' (RSA) to the list of known hosts.
fre1230: Warning: Permanently added 'fre1231,192.168.112.31' (RSA) to the list of known hosts.
fre1232: Warning: Permanently added 'fre1231,192.168.112.31' (RSA) to the list of known hosts.
Resetting fail_loc and fail_val on all nodes...done.
FAIL 18a (2s)

stderr.log
fre1229: error: set_param: /proc/{fs,sys}/{lnet,lustre}/osd-ldiskfs/track_declares_assert: Found no match
fre1230: error: set_param: /proc/{fs,sys}/{lnet,lustre}/osd-ldiskfs/track_declares_assert: Found no match
item.summary: recovery-small_18a test failed : error on ioctl 0x4008669a for '/mnt/lustre/d18a.recovery-small/f18a.recovery-small' (3): Invalid argument

status.description: A resolution has been taken, and it is awaiting verification by reporter. From here issues are either reopened, or are closed.

comments.comment: https://review.whamcloud.com/27483 is abandoned, required to close this issue.

@Andreas

This issue seen when journal size is not sufficient for ost's or user provides smaller journal size in this case ost's not get added in active list, this is seen with our interop (Server 2.1.0.x5 - Client 2.5.1).

>>  it is better to ensure that the OST is active, rather skipping the test

Can i write function in t-f to check ost's active with OSTCOUNT which get called at the beginning of test-suite?

test-suite will get exited when ost's not active with message.

What version of Lustre is involved here? Please fill in "Affects" and "Environment".

Also, it is better to ensure that the OST is active, rather skipping the test , otherwise we could say the same about all the later tests and skip those as well.

jadhav.vikram (jadhav.vikram@seagate.com) uploaded a new patch: https://review.whamcloud.com/27483
Subject: LU-9614 tests: skip test when ost2 is inactive
Project: fs/lustre-release
Branch: master
Current Patch Set: 1
Commit: 86da96b188ef8218a376ba9e7c18b8d8a2ba7e88
